import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; const Navbar = () => { const { user, logout } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [isMobileMenuOpen, setIsMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false); const handleLogout = () => { logout(); navigate('/login'); }; return (
{/* Logo and Brand */}
🏗️

Infrastructure Monitor

Smart City Solutions

{/* Desktop Navigation */}
{user ? ( <> 📊 Dashboard 📝 Report Issue 🗺️ Map View {user.role === 'admin' && ( ⚙️ Admin )}
Welcome, {user.name}
{user.role}
) : ( <> Login Get Started )}
{/* Mobile menu button */}
{/* Mobile Navigation */} {isMobileMenuOpen && (
{user ? ( <> setIsMobileMenuOpen(false)} > 📊 Dashboard setIsMobileMenuOpen(false)} > 📝 Report Issue setIsMobileMenuOpen(false)} > 🗺️ Map View {user.role === 'admin' && ( setIsMobileMenuOpen(false)} > ⚙️ Admin )}
Welcome, {user.name}
{user.role}
) : ( <> setIsMobileMenuOpen(false)} > Login setIsMobileMenuOpen(false)} > Get Started )}
)}
); }; export default Navbar;
